title: grammitis cervicornis
intro: Grammitis cervicornis, also known as the Deer Horn Fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the Grammitidaceae family. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can be used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Grammitis cervicornis include its ability to reduce fever, relieve headaches, and act as a natural diuretic. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, and other remedies.
